text: Somewhere out there.
scene: A vast flat dark navy night sky full of simple white star dots over a low dark hill, big black caps SOMEWHERE OUT THERE. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: The odds say there is probably alien life.
scene: A pair of simple dice floating among the stars beside a tiny green cartoon alien face, big black caps THE ODDS SAY... PROBABLY. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: Maybe a little. Maybe oceans of it.
scene: Two little panels: one tiny green alien dot, then a whole ocean of little green alien dots, big caps A LITTLE? OR OCEANS? Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: Which raises a question almost nobody actually stops to ask.
scene: Stan on a small hill at night looking up, a big glowing question mark forming among the stars. (Stan is always the same plain crude stick figure: round white head, two dot eyes, a simple line mouth, thin line body and limbs, no hair.) Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: Even if they are real, could they ever actually get here?
scene: A tiny green alien on a far star and Earth far apart, a long dotted line between them with a red question mark, big black caps COULD THEY GET HERE? Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: Could anything?
scene: A lone doodle rocket facing the huge starfield with a red question mark, big black caps COULD ANYTHING? Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: Stan looks up at the stars half expecting an easy yes.
scene: Stan on the hill looking up hopefully, a thought bubble with a little green alien waving, expectant. (Stan is always the same plain crude stick figure: round white head, two dot eyes, a simple line mouth, thin line body and limbs, no hair.) Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: But the true answer hides one of the most staggering facts
scene: A glowing treasure-chest shape half open among the stars leaking light, big black caps A STAGGERING FACT. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: about the universe you will ever sit with.
scene: The huge starfield pressing down over tiny Stan, vast and quiet. (Stan is always the same plain crude stick figure: round white head, two dot eyes, a simple line mouth, thin line body and limbs, no hair.) Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: And once you see it, you will never look at that night sky
scene: Stan looking up as the whole night sky subtly shifts, stars gleaming, big black caps NEVER THE SAME AGAIN. (Stan is always the same plain crude stick figure: round white head, two dot eyes, a simple line mouth, thin line body and limbs, no hair.) Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: the same way again.
scene: The starfield with one star circled in red, ready to zoom in. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: Start with the closest possible neighbor.
scene: A simple map line from a cartoon Earth toward one nearby star, big black caps THE CLOSEST NEIGHBOR. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: The nearest star to us other than our own sun
scene: A bright single star with a yellow sun far behind it, the star tagged with an arrow, big black caps NOT OUR SUN. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: is called Proxima Centauri.
scene: The bright star with a hand-lettered name tag, big black caps PROXIMA CENTAURI. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: It is about four light years away.
scene: The star and Earth with a measuring line between them, big black caps 4 LIGHT-YEARS. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: Four. That sounds almost walkable, cosmically speaking.
scene: A big hand-lettered number 4 with a tiny walking stick figure beside it, big black caps ALMOST WALKABLE? Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: But a light year is the distance light travels in a year.
scene: A glowing light beam racing along a measuring line with a one-year calendar beside it, big black caps 1 LIGHT-YEAR. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: And light is the fastest thing that exists around 186,000
scene: A glowing light beam zooming past a doodle rocket leaving it in the dust, big black caps 186,000 MILES A SECOND. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: miles every single second.
scene: The glowing beam streaking across the frame with speed lines. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: The light landing in your eye from that star tonight
scene: A beam of starlight traveling from the far star into Stan's wide eye on the dark hill. (Stan is always the same plain crude stick figure: round white head, two dot eyes, a simple line mouth, thin line body and limbs, no hair.) Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: left it more than four years ago.
scene: The light beam mid-journey with a calendar flipping four years beside it, big black caps LEFT 4 YEARS AGO. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: So four is hiding something enormous.
scene: The big number 4 peeled up at a corner revealing a huge dark gulf hiding underneath, big black caps HIDING SOMETHING ENORMOUS. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: Because here's the catch that changes everything.
scene: A red warning flag planted in space, big black caps THE CATCH. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: We cannot travel at the speed of light.
scene: A doodle rocket bouncing off a thick wall labeled LIGHT SPEED, big black caps CAN'T BE DONE. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: Nothing with mass can.
scene: A small heavy object with a red X, big black caps NOTHING WITH MASS. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: Pushing any object up to light speed
scene: The rocket pushing hard against the light-speed wall, strain lines. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: would take an infinite amount of energy.
scene: A huge tipping fuel gauge spiraling to an infinity symbol, big black caps INFINITE ENERGY. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: The universe simply forbids it.
scene: The universe drawn as a stern referee holding up a red card, big black caps FORBIDDEN. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: So the real question becomes how fast can we actually go?
scene: A speedometer with the needle far below the LIGHT mark, big black caps HOW FAST CAN WE GO? Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: And the answer is humbling.
scene: Stan looking at the speedometer with a humbled face. (Stan is always the same plain crude stick figure: round white head, two dot eyes, a simple line mouth, thin line body and limbs, no hair.) Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: Our fastest spacecraft.
scene: A small doodle space probe with little thruster flames, big black caps OUR FASTEST. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: If you aimed it straight at that nearest star
scene: The probe aimed along a dotted line at the far star. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: would not take hundreds of years.
scene: A crossed-out label reading HUNDREDS OF YEARS, big black caps NOT HUNDREDS. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: It would take tens of thousands.
scene: A stack of calendar pages towering like a mountain, big black caps TENS OF THOUSANDS. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: Voyager, our most famous probe,
scene: The little Voyager probe with its dish antenna, hand-lettered VOYAGER. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: would need roughly 77,000 years to get there.
scene: Voyager on the long dotted line to the star with a huge tag, big black caps 77,000 YEARS. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: Let that land with one number.
scene: One huge glowing number alone on the dark sky, big black caps ONE NUMBER. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: Voyager has been flying away from Earth
scene: Tiny Voyager flying away from a cartoon Earth, a small trail behind it. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: for almost 50 years now.
scene: A calendar beside Voyager reading 50 YEARS, big black caps 50 YEARS OUT. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: Faster than any of us will ever move.
scene: Voyager streaking with speed lines past a tiny astronaut, big black caps FASTEST THING WE'VE SENT. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: And in all that time, it has traveled about one light day
scene: A short measuring line from Earth to Voyager, big black caps = 1 LIGHT-DAY. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: from home, one day at the speed of light.
scene: The same short line with a glowing beam crossing it in one single day on a calendar. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: The nearest star is over 1,500 light days away.
scene: The short 1-light-day line beside an enormously longer line stretching off-frame to the star, big black caps 1,500+ LIGHT-DAYS. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: We have been going for half a century
scene: A cartoon Earth drawn as a house with a porch, Voyager barely past the porch step, big black caps HALF A CENTURY... Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: and we are barely off the porch.
scene: Tiny Voyager just off the porch of Earth-house, the starfield vast beyond, big black caps BARELY OFF THE PORCH. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: So now flip it around and put yourself in the aliens' shoes.
scene: A little green alien standing in its own shoes looking across the same huge gulf toward Earth, big black caps NOW FLIP IT. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: For them to cross that same impossible gulf and reach us,
scene: The alien saucer at the edge of the enormous dotted gulf, Earth a tiny dot on the far side. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: they would need technology that to us
scene: The alien holding a glowing toolbox sparkling with stars, big black caps PURE MAGIC TECH. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: would look like pure magic.
scene: The saucer glowing like a wizard hat with sparkles, big black caps LOOKS LIKE MAGIC. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: They would either have to travel at a massive fraction
scene: The saucer racing at a glowing fraction-of-light meter, big black caps NEAR LIGHT SPEED. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: of light speed, which takes amounts of energy
scene: A colossal energy gauge dwarfing the little saucer, big black caps IMPOSSIBLE ENERGY. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: that are almost beyond imagining,
scene: The energy gauge exploding past its top, beyond imagining. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: or they would have to break the rules of space itself.
scene: The fabric of space drawn as a grid being torn open by little hands, big black caps BREAK THE RULES. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: Physicists actually have one idea for that, the warp drive.
scene: A physicist stick figure at a chalkboard with a bubble-shaped ship sketch, big black caps THE WARP DRIVE. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: The trick is you do not move through space,
scene: A ship sitting still inside a bubble while the space grid moves around it, big black caps DON'T MOVE THROUGH SPACE. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: you move space around your ship,
scene: The bubble ship with arrows showing space itself flowing past, big black caps MOVE SPACE ITSELF. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: like a surfer riding a wave.
scene: A stick figure surfing a big curling wave of space-grid, big black caps LIKE A SURFER. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: And the math genuinely works.
scene: A chalkboard of equations with a big green check mark, big black caps THE MATH WORKS. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: The only problem is it requires a kind of matter
scene: A small warning label on the chalkboard, big black caps ONE PROBLEM. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: with negative energy that, as far as we know,
scene: A mysterious glowing purple lump labeled NEGATIVE ENERGY with a question mark. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: has never been found and may not exist at all.
scene: The purple lump fading into a dotted outline, big black caps MAY NOT EXIST. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: Even our single best real attempt, tiny probes,
scene: A tiny square light-sail probe the size of a stamp, big black caps OUR BEST REAL ATTEMPT. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: pushed by lasers to a fifth of light speed,
scene: Giant laser beams from Earth pushing the tiny sail, big black caps LASERS. 20% LIGHT SPEED. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: would still take 20 years to reach the nearest star.
scene: The tiny sail on the dotted line to the star with a 20 YEARS tag. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: And that project quietly stalled.
scene: The little sail probe parked under a dusty tarp, big black caps QUIETLY STALLED. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: This is not a new puzzle, by the way.
scene: An old framed photo wall, big black caps NOT A NEW PUZZLE. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: Back in 1950, a brilliant physicist named Enrico Fermi
scene: A doodle physicist with neat hair at a lunch table, a name card reading ENRICO FERMI, hand-lettered 1950.

text: was just chatting over lunch about the chances of alien life
scene: Fermi chatting over sandwiches with colleagues, a little alien doodle on a napkin.

text: and he asked a simple question
scene: Fermi pausing mid-bite, a lightbulb popping over his head.

text: that has haunted science ever since.
scene: Fermi looking up from the lunch table at an empty starry sky through a window.

text: Where is everybody?
scene: A vast empty starfield with huge hand-lettered caps WHERE IS EVERYBODY? Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: Think about it, the galaxy is unbelievably huge
scene: A spiral doodle galaxy stretching across the frame, big black caps UNBELIEVABLY HUGE. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: and unbelievably old billions of years.
scene: The galaxy beside a birthday cake with billions of candles, big black caps BILLIONS OF YEARS OLD. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: If intelligent life is common and crossing space
scene: Little alien dots scattered across the galaxy with a question mark, big black caps IF LIFE IS COMMON... Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: were doable, then somebody somewhere
scene: A doorbell on Earth with a long dotted line from the galaxy, big black caps SOMEBODY SHOULD HAVE... Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: in all that time should have shown up.
scene: Earth's doorbell untouched, cobwebs on it, big black caps ...SHOWN UP. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: And yet, silence, they call it the Fermi paradox
scene: A dead-quiet starfield with a tiny tumbleweed, big black caps SILENCE. THE FERMI PARADOX. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: and one of the simplest answers to it
scene: A list of possible answers on a scroll, one glowing at the bottom, big black caps THE SIMPLEST ANSWER. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: is also the most humbling.
scene: The glowing answer line half revealed, humbling. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: Maybe nobody shows up because nobody can.
scene: An empty road between two distant planets with a red X, big black caps MAYBE NOBODY CAN. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: Here is the quiet, strange truth this points to.
scene: A soft glowing truth emerging from the dark, big black caps THE QUIET TRUTH. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: The universe might be absolutely teeming with life
scene: The starfield absolutely sprinkled with tiny green alien dots everywhere, big black caps TEEMING WITH LIFE. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: and it could still be true that none of them ever meet,
scene: All the little alien dots with sad zero meeting lines between them, big black caps NONE EVER MEET. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: not because they are not there,
scene: The aliens all present and real with green checks, big black caps THEY'RE THERE. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: but because every civilization is stranded
scene: One little planet drawn as a tiny desert island with a single figure on it, big black caps STRANDED. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: on its own little island of a solar system.
scene: A tiny solar-system island with its sun as a palm tree, the figure waving. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: Separated by gulfs so vast that even light,
scene: Several little island planets separated by enormous dark gulfs of empty space. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: the fastest thing in existence takes years
scene: A glowing light beam straining and sweating as it crosses the huge gulf, big black caps EVEN LIGHT STRAINS. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: and centuries and thousands of years to cross.
scene: The beam's journey marked YEARS... CENTURIES... THOUSANDS OF YEARS along the gulf. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: We might be surrounded by neighbors we can never visit.
scene: Little island planets each with a tiny waving figure, none able to visit, big black caps NEIGHBORS WHO NEVER VISIT. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: And it cuts both ways, which is the part we forget.
scene: A two-way arrow across the gulf between Earth and the alien island, big black caps IT CUTS BOTH WAYS. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: We are not reaching them either.
scene: Earth with little rockets and telescopes pointing out, big black caps WE'RE NOT REACHING THEM EITHER. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: For all our rockets and telescopes and ambition,
scene: Earth bristling with tiny rockets, telescopes and antennas, ambitious. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: we have exactly one probe a single light day out
scene: Tiny Voyager one light-day from Earth, the rest of the starfield untouched, big black caps ONE PROBE. ONE LIGHT-DAY. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: after 50 years of trying.
scene: A 50-year calendar stack beside the tiny probe distance. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: The aliens may very well be real.
scene: A little green alien with a green check beside the words, big black caps MAY VERY WELL BE REAL. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: They just cannot get to us and we cannot get to them.
scene: Earth and the alien island both reaching toward each other across the gulf, hands not touching, big black caps NEITHER CAN CROSS. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: The silence in the sky might not mean
scene: The silent starfield with a red X over the word EMPTY, big black caps NOT EMPTY. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: the universe is empty at all.
scene: The starfield instead FULL of faint little lights everywhere. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: It might just mean it is so full
scene: All the little lights spread impossibly far apart across the dark, big black caps SO FULL, SO SPREAD OUT. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: and so impossibly spread out that everyone is alone together.
scene: Every little island lit up at once, each alone, all together, big black caps ALONE TOGETHER. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: So the next time you look up and wonder
scene: Stan back on his hill looking up at the vast starfield, calm. (Stan is always the same plain crude stick figure: round white head, two dot eyes, a simple line mouth, thin line body and limbs, no hair.) Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: if anyone is out there, the honest answer is probably.
scene: Stan looking up, a gentle hand-lettered answer floating in the sky, big black caps PROBABLY. (Stan is always the same plain crude stick figure: round white head, two dot eyes, a simple line mouth, thin line body and limbs, no hair.) Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: Somewhere they simply cannot reach you
scene: A faint friendly alien dot waving from impossibly far away across the stars. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: and you cannot reach them not because the universe is empty
scene: Stan and the distant alien dot at opposite corners of the huge sky, both small, both real. (Stan is always the same plain crude stick figure: round white head, two dot eyes, a simple line mouth, thin line body and limbs, no hair.) Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: but because it is so unimaginably vast
scene: The enormous starfield stretching beyond the frame edges, big black caps UNIMAGINABLY VAST. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: that even light strains to cross it.
scene: A light beam wiping its brow mid-journey across the dark, straining to cross. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: We are not alone, we are just very, very far apart.
scene: Stan small under the sky with the words glowing gently above, big black caps NOT ALONE. JUST FAR APART. (Stan is always the same plain crude stick figure: round white head, two dot eyes, a simple line mouth, thin line body and limbs, no hair.) Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: And a universe that big, that full
scene: The whole sky brimming with stars and faint lights, immense and beautiful. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: and that far flung is not a sad thought.
scene: A red X over the words A SAD THOUGHT, big black caps NOT A SAD THOUGHT. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: It might be the most astonishing thing
scene: Stan small but glowing warm with awe under the gigantic brilliant night sky. (Stan is always the same plain crude stick figure: round white head, two dot eyes, a simple line mouth, thin line body and limbs, no hair.) Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.

text: about being here at all.
scene: Stan on the hill at peace under the most beautiful star-filled sky, big black caps THE MOST ASTONISHING THING. (Stan is always the same plain crude stick figure: round white head, two dot eyes, a simple line mouth, thin line body and limbs, no hair.) Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots.
